reasoning: The target baseline price is the closing price on October 24 (the final trading day before the knowledge cutoff). On this date, MRK saw an exceptional 8.5% rally to roughly 105.1, likely driven by anticipation of a PDUFA label update for Winrevair on Oct 25. This sets our comparison threshold at an extreme local maximum. Furthermore, Q3 earnings are scheduled to be released on October 30. Analysts (e.g. Leerink) have recently downgraded their forecasts for MRK due to slowing Keytruda and Gardasil growth. The combination of a massive pre-earnings double-digit run-up and lowered earnings expectations creates a classic 'buy the rumor, sell the news' setup with disproportionally high downside risk relative to the 105.1 peak. Therefore, the probability of exceeding this specific outlier peak is below 50% in the immediate short term (November 2), as mean reversion or profit-taking following earnings is likely. Uncertainty appropriately increases over time, so probabilities regress back towards the neutral ~0.50 long-term market drift.
